title: Pattern Train
description: A train-car pattern game where kids continue color and shape sequences.
learningGoals: Recognize AB, ABC, and AAB repeating patterns
Extend a visual pattern by one or two train cars
Name colors and simple shapes through spoken playback
interactionModel: pattern-continue tap the next wagon to fill the train
feedbackModel: Correct choices fly into the train and play back the full pattern; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Color Cars
modes.skill: AB, ABC, and AAB color-pattern extension

credits: Emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
